description: Maps Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and neutral agent docs to the single operational runtime under .claude/

adapters.purpose: Claude Code project memory and operational policy; defers execution to .claude/
Cursor Project Rules (always-on); defers state and gates to .claude/
Thin contract for Codex and generic agents; bootstrap creates once, never overwritten by updater
Tool-neutral runtime summary, handoff protocol, operating contract, plus legacy .agents/ pointer for template compatibility
